about_text:
Mini Supermarket, operated by Perfect Trading Company, has been serving the community since 2006.

We offer a wide range of everyday essentials including fresh vegetables, meat, fish, groceries, kitchen utensils and more, all in one place.

We are known for our quality, variety and convenience, making your daily shopping simple and reliable.

Everything you need, in one place. A fresh choice for every home.
feat_delivery_desc: Fast and reliable delivery to your doorstep
feat_halal_desc: Trusted quality, meeting all halal standards
feat_parking_desc: Easy and hassle-free parking for all customers
feat_since_desc: Serving the local community for nearly two decades
feat_oneplace_desc: Groceries, fresh items, daily needs—all under one roof
feat_store_desc: Comfortable shopping experience with wide aisles
offer_2: Buy 1 Get 1 Free on selected dairy
